mapper.sql: M.MEMBER_SEQ AS memberSeq, M.MEMBER_ID AS memberId, M.MEMBER_PWD AS memberPwd, M.MEMBER_NAME AS memberName, M.NICKNAME AS nickname, M.BIRTH_YMD AS birthYmd, M.EMAIL AS email, COALESCE( CASE WHEN M.PROFILE_IMAGE_FILE_SEQ IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT('/api/files/view/', M.PROFILE_IMAGE_FILE_SEQ) END, M.PROFILE_IMAGE_URL ) AS profileImageUrl, M.PROFILE_IMAGE_FILE_SEQ AS profileImageFileSeq, M.GENDER AS gender, M.PHONE AS phone, M.GRADE_CODE AS gradeCode, M.STATUS_CODE AS statusCode, (SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT MR.ROLE_CODE ORDER BY MR.ROLE_CODE SEPARATOR ',') FROM member_role MR WHERE MR.MEMBER_SEQ = M.MEMBER_SEQ) AS roleCodesDisplay, DATE_FORMAT(M.CREATE_DT, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS createDt, DATE_FORMAT(M.MODIFY_DT, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS modifyDt, M.OAUTH_PROVIDER AS oauthProvider, M.OAUTH_SUBJECT AS oauthSubject, DATE_FORMAT(M.OAUTH_SYNC_DT, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS oauthSyncDt, DATE_FORMAT(M.LAST_LOGIN_DT, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS lastLoginAt, M.LAST_LOGIN_IP AS lastLoginIp
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM member M
ORDER BY
M.MEMBER_ID M.MEMBER_NAME M.GRADE_CODE M.STATUS_CODE M.CREATE_DT M.MODIFY_DT M.MEMBER_SEQ
ASC DESC
LIMIT #{safeSize} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT
FROM member M WHERE M.MEMBER_SEQ = #{memberSeq} AND M.USE_YN = 'Y'

SELECT
FROM member M WHERE M.MEMBER_ID = #{memberId} AND M.USE_YN = 'Y'

SELECT
FROM member M WHERE M.MEMBER_ID = #{memberId} AND LOWER(TRIM(M.EMAIL)) = LOWER(TRIM(#{email})) AND M.USE_YN = 'Y' AND (M.STATUS_CODE IS NULL OR M.STATUS_CODE IN ('ACTIVE', 'SUSPENDED')) LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO member ( BIRTH_YMD, CREATE_DT, CREATE_ID, CREATE_IP, EMAIL, PROFILE_IMAGE_URL, PROFILE_IMAGE_FILE_SEQ, GENDER, MEMBER_ID, MEMBER_NAME, NICKNAME, MEMBER_PWD, MODIFY_DT, MODIFY_ID, MODIFY_IP, PHONE, GRADE_CODE, STATUS_CODE, OAUTH_PROVIDER, OAUTH_SUBJECT, OAUTH_SYNC_DT, USE_YN ) VALUES ( #{birthYmd}, NOW(), #{createId}, #{createIp}, #{email}, #{profileImageUrl}, #{profileImageFileSeq}, #{gender}, #{memberId}, #{memberName}, #{nickname}, #{memberPwd}, NOW(), #{modifyId}, #{modifyIp}, #{phone}, #{gradeCode}, #{statusCode}, #{oauthProvider}, #{oauthSubject}, NOW(), 'Y' )
mapper.update: UPDATE member SET MEMBER_PWD = #{memberPwd}, MODIFY_DT = NOW(), MODIFY_ID = #{modifyId}, MODIFY_IP = #{modifyIp} WHERE MEMBER_SEQ = #{memberSeq} AND USE_YN = 'Y'
UPDATE member SET STATUS_CODE = 'WITHDRAWN', USE_YN = 'N', MODIFY_DT = NOW() WHERE MEMBER_SEQ = #{memberSeq} AND USE_YN = 'Y'
